---
title: "Shiny App"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## NCMA SGV Website Performance Shiny App

The Shiny App focuses on device category and sessions over time. It is an interactive dashboard that can be filtered by desktop, mobile, or tablet with adjustable time frame.

[Open the Shiny App Directly](https://kaylacortez.shinyapps.io/kayla-cortez-dashboard-app/)

```{=html}

<iframe 
  src="https://kaylacortez.shinyapps.io/kayla-cortez-dashboard-app/"
  width="100%"
  height="1100px"
  style="border:1px solid #ddd;">
  
</iframe>
```
